title: senecio umbrosus
intro: Senecio umbrosus, also known as Umbrella Plant or Groundsel, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Senecio umbrosus include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Senecio umbrosus can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, but caution should be exercised due to potential toxicity and side effects.
